untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of stock price proximity to two specific option strike prices (distance to lower strike vs distance to higher strike). This requires knowledge of strike prices and relative distance calculations not available in standard OHLCV indicators. The signal is inherently options-structure-based and cannot be fully expressed using only price action and technical indicators without custom strike price parameters.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using pivot point as a reference level, but this does not capture the precise logic of the original signal which compares relative distances to two option strike prices. For proper implementation, this signal requires strike price inputs and proximity calculation logic beyond standard technical indicators.
